summary: Tested Pre-Sales to Sales transfer bug fix. Backend fix confirmed: line 578 now uses `stage.get('is_final') and not lead.get('transferred_to_lead_id')` instead of hardcoded name check. All 9 requested features verified working via API tests. 3 transferred leads (Vinothini, Preethi, Saikarthick) visible in Sales CRM with transferred_from_lead_id. LeadSource enum now includes 'sem', 'social_media', 'direct'. Stage Management page accessible for super_admin.
critical_code_review_comments: Bug fix at line 578 in crm.py correctly changed from hardcoded stage name check to is_final + double-transfer prevention
LeadSource enum now has all needed values (sem, social_media, direct) - no more Pydantic validation errors

success_rate.backend: 100% (10/10 passed, 4 skipped due to rate limiting)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Pre-Sales to Sales transfer fix verified. Key data: 3 leads transferred (Vinothini, Preethi, Saikarthick) from Pre-Sales 'Appointment Booked' stage to Sales 'New Appointment' stage. Stage Management at /settings/stages works for super_admin. Rate limiting: 5 req/min for login - wait 60s between batches.

manage_stages_button.status: PASS - visible in Stage Management UI screenshot

ui_screenshots.stage_management: Shows 6 Pre-Sales stages (including RNR) and 'Appointment Booked' as Final with 3 leads
